name: Dining Plate with Fork and Knife
desc: The primary icon for formal dining and sit-down meals. Perfect for restaurant reviews, dinner invitations, and culinary arts content.

name: Dining Fork and Knife
desc: A universal symbol for eating and restaurants. High SEO value for food service, catering, and general dining-out topics.

name: Dining Celebration Toast
desc: Represents fine dining celebrations, anniversaries, and toasts. Ideal for wine lists, celebratory dinners, and luxury events.

name: Dining Wine Glass
desc: Specific to upscale dining and beverage pairing. Used for promoting wine bars, vineyards, and sophisticated evening meals.

name: Dining Italian Pasta
desc: Represents the experience of dining on classic Italian cuisine. Great for bistro menus, food photography, and Mediterranean diet blogs.

name: Dining Sushi Experience
desc: The icon for Japanese fine dining. Perfect for sushi bar promotions, seafood quality topics, and international cuisine guides.

name: Dining Healthy Salad
desc: Represents health-conscious dining and vegan/vegetarian options. Ideal for clean eating, farm-to-table menus, and wellness lifestyle content.

name: Dining Steakhouse Cut
desc: Symbolizes hearty dining and steakhouse experiences. Targeted at carnivore diets, BBQ restaurants, and high-protein meal options.

name: Dining Dessert Custard
desc: Captures the post-meal dining experience. Used for dessert menus, pastry shops, and ending a fine dining experience on a sweet note.

name: Dining Candlelight
desc: The symbol for romantic dining and intimate atmospheres. Used for date night ideas, Valentine's Day specials, and mood-setting decor.

name: Dining Receipt
desc: Represents the end of a dining experience and financial transactions. Useful for tipping guides, business expense tracking, and retail dining.

name: Dining Chef
desc: Represents the culinary expertise behind the dining experience. Great for kitchen tutorials, restaurant staff highlights, and cooking schools.
